question_text:
Find Numbers with Even Number of Digits

Given an array nums of integers, return how many of them contain an even number of digits.

Example 1:

Input: nums = [12,345,2,6,7896]
Output: 2
Explanation: 12 has 2 digits (even). 345 has 3 digits (odd). 2 has 1 digit (odd). 6 has 1 digit (odd). 7896 has 4 digits (even). Total = 2.

Constraints:

  • 1 <= nums.length <= 500
  • 1 <= nums[i] <= 105
output_format: Count of integers in nums that have an even number of digits.
explanation:
String Length Check

Convert each number to string and check if its length is even. Sum up the count using a simple conditional.

Time: O(N × log(max_val)). Space: O(1).
answer:
def findNumbers(nums):
    return sum(len(str(n)) % 2 == 0 for n in nums)
